reading_units.text: 子曰：「鬼神之為德，其盛矣乎！

layers.translation_en: The Master said, "How abundantly do spiritual beings display the powers that belong to them!

reading_units.text: 視之而弗見，聽之而弗聞，體物而不可遺。

layers.translation_en: We look for them, but do not see them; we listen to, but do not hear them; yet they enter into all things, and there is nothing without them.

reading_units.text: 使天下之人齊明盛服，以承祭祀。洋洋乎！如在其上，如在其左右。

layers.translation_en: They cause all the people in the kingdom to fast and purify themselves, and array themselves in their richest dresses, in order to attend at their sacrifices.

reading_units.text: 詩曰：『神之格思，不可度思！矧可射思！』

layers.translation_en: Then, like overflowing water, they seem to be over the heads, and on the right and left of their worshippers.

reading_units.text: 夫微之顯，誠之不可揜如此夫。」

layers.translation_en: It is said in the Book of Poetry, 'The approaches of the spirits, you cannot surmise; and can you treat them with indifference?' Such is the manifestness of what is minute! Such is the impossibility of repressing the outgoings of sincerity!"

chapter.text:
子曰：「鬼神之為德，其盛矣乎！
視之而弗見，聽之而弗聞，體物而不可遺。
使天下之人齊明盛服，以承祭祀。洋洋乎！如在其上，如在其左右。
詩曰：『神之格思，不可度思！矧可射思！』
夫微之顯，誠之不可揜如此夫。」

source_title: 四書章句集注 : 中庸章句
